title: Red Squadron (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:RedSquadronVeteran-SWZ.png|thumb|right|270px|A Rebel Alliance X-wing veteran of Red Squadron]]
'''Red Squadron''' was the name of a number of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadrons in operation throughout galactic history:

==Canon==
*'''[[Red Squadron (Galactic Republic)|Red Squadron]]''', a [[Clone trooper pilot|clone]] flight squadron that fought throughout the [[Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)|Red Squadron]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] starfighter squadron during the [[Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Red Squadron (Resistance)|Red Squadron]]''', a [[Resistance]] starfighter squadron active during the conflict against the [[First Order]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Red Wing (Old Republic)|Red Wing]]''', a fighter group of [[Aurek-class tactical strikefighter]]s that fought during the [[Jedi Civil War]], and later during the [[First Jedi Purge]].
*'''[[Red Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Red Squadron]]''', a [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone]] flight squadron that fought throughout the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] squadron that participated in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
*'''[[Red Squadron (Star Tours)|Red Squadron]]''', an X-wing squadron that encountered a [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency starship during a battle.
*'''[[Red Squadron (Mandjur)|Red Squadron]]''', an X-wing squadron stationed on the New Republic [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Mandjur]]''.
*'''[[Fighter Red|Red Squadron]]''', an [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighter]] squadron stationed on the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']].
*'''[[Red Squadron (Imperial)|Red Squadron]]''', a fake [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] unit made by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Hegemony theater]].
*'''[[Red Squadron (Thurse)|Red Squadron]]''', a New Republic [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] squadron that was part of the ''[[Thurse]]''{{'s}} complement.
*'''[[Red Squadron (Galactic Alliance)|Red Squadron]]''', a starfighter squadron that participated in the late stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
*'''[[Red Squadron (Sith Empire)|Red Squadron]]''' a starfighter squadron that was part of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]].
*'''[[Red Squadron (Mugaari)|Red Squadron]]''', a squadron used by the [[Mugaari pirates]].

==See also==
*'''[[Red squad]]''', a part of [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]].
*'''[[Red Flight]]''', a temporary [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] detachment assembled for an ambassadorial trip to [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]].
*'''[[Red Flight (K-wings)|Red Flight]]''', a [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter]] flight that was part of the New Republic's [[24th Bombardment Squadron]].
*[[Red Flight (Rebel Alliance)|'''Red Flight (Rebel Alliance)''']], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[T-65B X-wing starfighter]] that was part of the [[Rebel Alliance Navy|Alliance Fleet]]
*[[Red Hand Squadron|'''Red Hand Squadron''']], a team of Rebel Alliance commandos
*'''[[Red Team (Isis)|Red Team]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Flight group/Legends|flight]] of three [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] assigned to [[Isis/Legends|Isis]].
{{Disambig}}
